login.title: Login to Reliquary
login.slogan: A Zero-Friction Voice Bridge to Your AI Exobrain
login.registerLink: No token? Register with Invite Code
login.errorToken: Invalid token or user not found
login.contactAdmin: Contact admin for an invite code
login.loginLink: Have a token? Back to Login
login.successDesc: Your account has been created successfully.
login.tokenWarning: Please save this token securely. You won't be able to see it again.

dashboard.title: Device Management
dashboard.subtitle: Manage connected Reliquary clients
dashboard.noDevicesDesc: Start a Reliquary client to see it here

history.title: History
history.subtitle: View voice recognition history
history.errorLoad: Failed to load logs, please check backend API
history.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this entry? This cannot be undone.
history.confirmDeleteDesc: Are you sure you want to delete this recording? It will be removed from your history permanently.
history.confirmClearDayDesc: This will permanently delete all records and audio files for this day. This action cannot be undone.
history.apiKeyDesc: Enter your Groq API key to retry processing. You can get one from console.groq.com.
history.apiKeyLocal: Stored in your browser only. Never sent to our server.

config.hotkeyWarning: Note: Only single keys supported (e.g. Right Shift, F9). Some keys may be intercepted by system.
config.apiKeyDesc: Groq API Key, get from https://console.groq.com/keys

pipelineConfig.title: Pipeline Config
pipelineConfig.subtitle: Customize keywords and prompts for each pipeline step
pipelineConfig.keywordsDesc: One word per line, max 10. Add words that are frequently misrecognized. Spaces, commas, or newlines all work.
pipelineConfig.userPromptDesc: Additional correction rules for this step.
pipelineConfig.userPromptPlaceholder:
e.g. Do not use dashes or ellipses
Do not change the meaning of the original text

landing.heroDesc: Eradicate input friction and push your LLMs to their absolute limits.
landing.heroDesc2: Run your AI exobrain at full power, at the native speed of thought.

sovereignty.title: Data Sovereignty
sovereignty.desc: Stop locking your high-value thoughts in big tech clouds. All interactions are Local First. Transform your daily high-frequency inputs into a private training dataset, paving the way for your future digital twin.

recall.title: Total Recall (RAG)
recall.desc: Say goodbye to write-only data graveyards. Locally accumulated unstructured voice logs are automatically transformed into structured assets. Query your past at any time and keep your digital memory on standby.

efficiency.title: Frictionless Flow & Certainty
efficiency.desc: No more aggressive auto-cutoffs. Take all the time you need to think. The built-in Fixer pipeline automatically repairs mixed languages and grammatical logic, distilling your chaotic rambling into flawless prompts.

cost.title: Architectural Arbitrage
cost.desc: Enjoy enterprise-grade compute at zero cost. An ingenious architecture optimized for the free tiers of top compute providers (like Groq). Process hundreds of high-intensity commands daily with sub-second latency, completely free.

pipeline.title: Programmable Workflows
pipeline.desc: You dictate exactly where your data flows. Push sanitized, standardized JSON payloads to any Webhook—whether it's quietly logging to your Obsidian vault or triggering n8n automation engines.

fortress.title: Zero Data Loss Guarantee
fortress.desc: Fundamentally eliminate the fear of talking to the void. With a minimalist Docker deployment, all audio streams are safely persisted to disk before hitting any API. Even during network drops, your inspiration never evaporates. Just hit retry.

deployment.title: Get Started
deployment.subtitle: Choose your preferred deployment method. We also provide a one-click trial environment.

client.mac: Installation via Homebrew is recommended. We automatically handle audio permissions:
client.mac_usage: Launch the client from your terminal. The initial setup will guide you:
client.mac_usage_step2: Enter Access Token (Generated in the backend dashboard)
client.win: On Windows, Scoop provides the cleanest installation experience:
client.android: Not available on Google Play yet. Please install by sideloading the APK:
client.android_steps:
Enable 'Install from Unknown Sources'
Download and install the latest APK
client.linux: Linux version coming soon. Stay tuned.
client.ios: The iOS client is under intensive development. Keep an eye on the repo.
client.pending: Feature under development. Please watch our GitHub repository for updates.

server.docker: Ideal for a quick start, testing, and daily personal use.
server.prod: Strongly recommended for public exposure. The built-in Caddy server automatically provisions and renews SSL certificates.
server.prod_edit: Fill in your actual domain and modify keys/environment variables as needed.
server.trial: No deployment needed. Data will be automatically destroyed after 24 hours.

trial.title: Trial Only, Zero Retention
trial.desc: We do not offer commercial services. This trial exists solely to lower the barrier to entry and save you the initial deployment hassle.
trial.warning: Your account and all generated voice/text data will be permanently and irreversibly wiped 24 hours after registration.

deployment.groqWarning: Note: You must configure your Groq API Key in the backend settings to enable core transcription and Fixer capabilities.
